hooks.command: SITE_ID="66f712aa-bcc9-4a39-8d66-ec394db48e30"; sleep 5; for i in $(seq 1 60); do RESULT=$(netlify api listSiteDeploys --data "{\"site_id\": \"$SITE_ID\"}" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d[0]['state'] + '|||' + (d[0].get('error_message') or ''))" 2>/dev/null); STATE=$(echo "$RESULT" | cut -d'|' -f1); MSG=$(echo "$RESULT" | cut -d'|' -f4-); if [ "$STATE" = "ready" ]; then echo "Netlify deployment succeeded!"; exit 2; elif [ "$STATE" = "error" ]; then echo "Netlify deployment FAILED: $MSG"; exit 2; fi; sleep 10; done; echo "Netlify deployment timed out after 10 minutes"; exit 2
